name: CRUD Manajemen User - Tambah, Edit, Ubah Role, Hapus
description: Test CRUD manajemen user: tambah user, edit data user, ubah role, hapus user. Login admin.

planSteps.description: Navigate to /login, fill email admin@inventory.com and password password, click login
User is redirected to dashboard
Click Manajemen User menu in the sidebar
Manajemen User page is visible with list of users
Click Tambah User button to open form
Create user modal is open
Fill Nama Lengkap input with User CRUD Test
Fill Email input with usercrud@test.com
Fill Password input with Password123!
Fill Konfirmasi Password input with Password123!
Select Staff Gudang or Admin from the Role dropdown
Click the Tambah User submit button inside the modal
New user appears in the user list
Click Ubah button on the newly created user card
Edit user modal is open
Select Admin or Staff Gudang from the Role dropdown to change role
Click the Simpan Perubahan button
User role is updated successfully in the list
Click Hapus button on the newly created user card
Delete confirmation modal is open
Click Ya, Hapus button inside the confirmation modal
User is removed from the list
